reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Very fast service when applying for a driver's license.

reviews.comment:
Es buena la atención de los muchachos Qué despachan combustible Pero hay una mujer qué desconecta la manguera para inflar las ruedas eso me pareció muy desagradable incluso desenchufo la máquina Eso no se hace si no quieren que uno infle las ruedas que no den el servicio

(Translated by Google)
The guys who pump the gas are good, but there's a woman who disconnects the hose for inflating tires, which I found very unpleasant. She even unplugged the machine. That's not right; if they don't want you to inflate your tires, they shouldn't offer the service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2511053987051317301/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURDNE5EbTNBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atencion. Algo de espera y un ritmo cancino. Miraron los liquidos y limpiaron los vidrios. El aca cumple.

(Translated by Google)
Very good service. A bit of a wait and a slow pace. They checked the fluids and cleaned the windows. It does the job.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2511053987051317301/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNfcDUzRE1nEAE

reviews.comment:
Que desastre de atención!!, más allá del playero que me tocó, Jorge, una maravilla, pero el resto...un desastre, tardan una eternidad en atender, parece que estás pidiendo un favor, después ...para el baño...línea directa con el gober...poco más!!, tenés que hacer un trámite..

(Translated by Google)
What a disaster of a service!! Apart from the attendant I got, Jorge, who was wonderful, the rest...a disaster. They take forever to serve you, it feels like you're asking for a favor. Then...for the bathroom...direct line to the governor...that's about it!! You have to complete a procedure...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2511053987051317301/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNfa3BTdWdRRRAB

reviews.comment:
